bird.name: Grey grasswren
bird.summary: The grey grasswren (Amytornis barbatus) is a passerine bird in the Australasian wren family, Maluridae. It is found on arid inland floodpla…

relations.subject: Grey grasswren
relations.evidence: Hardy recorded significantly more captures in declared drought years than in normal years. thumb|right|Grey grasswren habitat During 2011, an extensive grey grasswren survey was conducted at Frome Swamp in New South Wales which had recently experienced substantial rainfall and resultant lignum and cane grass growth
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
